name: credit-risk-scoring
description: Computes credit risk scores based on credit history, income, debt ratios, and application data.
long_description: This circuit verifies the computation of credit risk scores for loan applications using standard credit scoring models. It incorporates income verification, employment history, debt-to-income ratios, and credit bureau data to produce a transparent, auditable credit score and approval probability. Designed for compliance with Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and Equal Credit Opportunity Act (ECOA) requirements.

private.name: employment_length
private.description: Years of employment at current job

private.name: debt_balance
private.description: Total outstanding debt in USD cents

public.name: loan_amount
public.description: Requested loan amount in USD cents

public.name: risk_category
public.description: Risk category: poor, fair, good, very-good, excellent

dataset_dependencies.description: CFPB Home Mortgage Disclosure Act data and lending standards

author: VRL Finance Working Group
security_notes: Uses standard credit scoring methodology. Designed to be transparent and auditable for FCRA/ECOA compliance. Does not use sensitive protected attributes (race, gender, religion).
performance_notes: Constraint count: 9. Proof generation time: ~100ms. Proof size: ~2KB. Uses BN254 curve for efficiency.

changelog.changes: Initial release with FCRA and ECOA compliance
